film.title: The Circle
film.overview: A young tech worker takes a job at a powerful Internet corporation, quickly rises up the company's ranks, and soon finds herself in a perilous situation concerning privacy, surveillance and freedom. She comes to learn that her decisions and actions will determine the future of humanity.

dialogues.dialogue: and then we got a call from someone watching the seals.  So, Mae, how do you feel?  Ashamed.  I... I barely slept.  Well, I'm just glad you're safe. We all are.
